title: #winning Dog Ball Launcher Pet Toy Shooting Bazooka & 2 K9 Friendly Tennis Balls
features: Manual Spring Loaded Pull Back Action Dog Tennis Ball Launcher Gun with Two Heavy Duty Dog Balls
Easy to Use by Simply Place a Dog Friendly Tennis Ball in the Muzzle, Pull Back the Firing Arm, Aim & Fire!
Now Made from ABS and POM Plastics for Enhanced Durability and Performance with Steel Workings
Includes 2 Dog Friendly Tennis Balls with Thick Wall Rubber Construction for Designed for Longevity
Ball Launcher Measures Around 60 cm by 20 cm by 9 cm | Dog Balls Measure Around 6.5 cm Diameter
Gun Rated to Fire Included Balls up to Around 20 Metres at 45° Angle with 10 M Roll On Hard Flat Surfaces
description: Product Description Dog Ball Launcher with 2 Balls and Carry Strap - Ultimate Fetch Game for Dogs Tired of wearing out your arm during playtime? The #winning dog ball launcher is here to save the day! This ideal companion for your furry friend takes fetch to a whole new level. Whether you’re at the park, beach, or in your own backyard, our ball launcher lets you send balls soaring farther and faster than ever before. With minimal effort, you’ll keep your dog entertained and active for hours. Included are two high-quality Durable, chew-resistant, dog balls perfect for any breed. with two, there's no more endless searching for that one ball! Along with this is a convenient carry strap that makes it easy to take with you on the go, whether you’re headed to the dog park or on a weekend adventure. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:00 Loaded : 0% Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:00   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected Audio Track Fullscreen This is a modal window. Fun for more than your dog Turn a simple game of fetch into a fun aiming challenge for you and your dog for exercise Bring it on Load and shoot one of the two included dog safe balls for your dog to chase up to 20 metres Fits Standard Tennis Balls Comes with 2 dog friendly tennis balls, perfect for long life extended play sessions Free Hands for Leads & Treats Includes a convenient adjustable strap for easy transport and carrying leaving your hands free What makes the #winning dog ball launcher stand out? The #winning dog ball launcher stands apart from the crowd as it's portable, lightweight and doesn't require batteries to use. Also we give you two balls and a carry strap! How does the carry strap benefit dog owners? The carry strap allows you to easily transport the launcher and balls without needing to use your hands, freeing you up to manage your dog or other gear during walks. Are the balls in the launcher suitable for all dogs and breeds? The included balls are standard tennis ball sized and made from durable, chew-resistant materials. Whilst this ideal for most dog breeds we don’t recommend this for very small dogs. How far can the ball be launched using the dog launcher? Our dog balls are designed for durability with the launcher throwing balls up to 2 to 3 times farther than by hand, giving your dog a great running challenge. My dog wants to use his favourite tennis ball - will it fit it? As long as it’s standard tennis ball sized, it should fit into our launcher - we recommend using dog safe balls to make sure man's best friend stays happy and healthy.
